name: ponytail
description: Lazy-senior-dev review/build discipline for AI coding agents.
usage: Type /ponytail in your agent to toggle modes (lite | full | ultra).

claude.steps: Follow the Claude install instructions in the ponytail README at https://github.com/DietrichGebert/ponytail

cursor.steps: Follow the Cursor install instructions in the ponytail README at https://github.com/DietrichGebert/ponytail

gemini.steps: Follow the Gemini install instructions in the ponytail README at https://github.com/DietrichGebert/ponytail

claude.steps: Remove the ponytail plugin files per the ponytail README.

cursor.steps: Remove the ponytail plugin files per the ponytail README.

gemini.steps: Remove the ponytail plugin files per the ponytail README.
